owner_operator_stated: Dr. Mandeep Raina, DDS is stated as the founder/primary dentist of Raina Dental Care.
notes: Address matches exactly (2323 Naperville Rd Ste 110, Naperville, IL 60563). Phone shown on site (630-381-4021) differs from record phone (630-364-2888), but address corroboration alone is sufficient per rule. No careers/hiring page found on site or in search.

Multi-doctor group practice with two locations (Naperville and Woodridge, IL) — a group/DSO-style multi-provider brand, not a solo practice. Dr. Amit Sud (record entity 'Sud Amit DDS') is one of 9 named dentists at the practice; no explicit statement of who owns/operates the group. Address (2879 W 95th St Ste 131) and phone (630-753-9955) both corroborated exactly via search/Yelp.

Address (1048 104th St #108) and phone (630-904-7100) both match exactly. Site states practice has served Naperville since 2001. No careers/hiring page found across homepage, about, and doctors pages.

Oral & maxillofacial surgery / TMJ specialty practice. Old domain kalantoms.com now returns 404 on every page (root, contact, meet-the-doctor) — dead. Current live site is pinkoralsurgery.com, branded 'Kalant, Pink & Associates', a 4-location group (Joliet, Yorkville, Naperville, Plainfield). Address (1303 Macom Dr) and phone (630-851-9100) confirmed matching via Yelp/ADA finder. Direct WebFetch of pinkoralsurgery.com returned 403 (bot-blocked) both attempts; doctor roster/description sourced from a WebSearch snippet of that page's actual content, not a directly loaded page. No careers/hiring info found.

owner_operator_stated: Site and business listings show 'English Rows Dental Group' currently operates at this address/phone — not 'Good Day Dental Sleep Center,' the record's named entity.
notes: SUCCESSOR CONFLICT: record entity 'GOOD DAY DENTAL SLEEP CENTER' at 3027 English Rows Ave Ste 203, Naperville, IL 60564, phone (630) 904-1106. That exact address+phone now belongs to 'English Rows Dental Group', a general dentistry practice confirmed on englishrowsdental.com and corroborated by Zocdoc/Yelp listings — no trace of a sleep-medicine-focused 'Good Day Dental Sleep Center' currently operating there. A similarly-named 'Naper Dental Sleep Center' brand surfaced in search as a possibly related successor sleep-specific entity but could not be confirmed at this specific address within research budget. No doctor names or hiring info found on englishrowsdental.com homepage (direct fetch of the record's own former domain was not applicable — no dead domain was given as a hint here, only the address/phone match).

owner_operator_stated: A LinkedIn profile for Paul Caputo lists him as 'Former Owner at Caputo Dental,' suggesting a possible ownership change; the practice's own site could not be directly loaded to confirm a current ownership statement either way.
notes: Address (3155 Book Rd Ste 107) and phone (630-922-1311) both confirmed exactly via Healthgrades group profile. Direct WebFetch of paulcaputodds.com (root + /locations/naperville/) returned 403 (bot-blocked) both times; roster sourced from Healthgrades group directory instead. FLAG FOR HUMAN REVIEW: a LinkedIn snippet describes 'Paul Caputo - Former Owner at Caputo Dental', hinting at a possible sale/ownership change (e.g. DSO acquisition) not otherwise corroborated within research budget; practice still operates under the Caputo name with Dr. Caputo and Dr. Matthew Drescher both listed as active dentists (56 and 1 ratings respectively). No careers/hiring page found.
